notes: Plural is 'Standards'. 'Den Standard halten/verbessern' = to maintain/improve the standard.

sentences.german: Der Standard der Hotels in diesem Land ist sehr hoch.
sentences.english: The standard of hotels in this country is very high.

sentences.german: Wir müssen unsere Standards kontinuierlich verbessern.
sentences.english: We need to continuously improve our standards.

cloze_sentences.english: The standard of the hotels is very high.
We need to improve our standards.
